tZh: GPT也能理解：P-Tuning——用可训练的连续提示嵌入提升自然语言理解性能
sEn: P-Tuning uses trainable continuous prompt embeddings to stabilize and improve NLU performance across various tasks and settings.
sZh: P-Tuning通过可训练的连续提示嵌入，稳定并提升了多种自然语言理解任务的性能。
absEn: Prompting a pretrained language model with natural language patterns has been proved effective for natural language understanding (NLU). However, our preliminary study reveals that manual discrete prompts often lead to unstable performance -- e.g., changing a single word in the prompt might result in substantial performance drop. We propose a novel method P-Tuning that employs trainable continuous prompt embeddings in concatenation with discrete prompts. Empirically, P-Tuning not only stabilizes training by minimizing the gap between various discrete prompts, but also improves performance by a sizeable margin on a wide range of NLU tasks including LAMA and SuperGLUE. P-Tuning is generally effective for both frozen and tuned language models, under both the fully-supervised and few-shot settings.
absZh: 使用自然语言模式对预训练语言模型进行提示已被证明对自然语言理解有效。然而，我们的初步研究表明，手动离散提示往往导致性能不稳定——例如，改变提示中的一个单词可能导致性能大幅下降。我们提出了一种新颖的方法P-Tuning，它将可训练的连续提示嵌入与离散提示连接起来。实验表明，P-Tuning不仅通过最小化各种离散提示之间的差距来稳定训练，而且在包括LAMA和SuperGLUE在内的广泛NLU任务上显著提升了性能。P-Tuning在冻结和微调的语言模型上，以及在完全监督和少样本设置下都普遍有效。

contrib.en: Proposes P-Tuning, using trainable continuous prompt embeddings with discrete prompts to stabilize and improve NLU performance.
contrib.zh: 提出P-Tuning，使用可训练的连续提示嵌入与离散提示结合，以稳定并提升NLU性能。

contrib.en: Shows P-Tuning reduces performance variance across different discrete prompts, enhancing training stability.
contrib.zh: 表明P-Tuning减少了不同离散提示间的性能差异，增强了训练稳定性。

contrib.en: Achieves significant gains on LAMA knowledge probing (20+ points over manual prompts) and SuperGLUE under both full-supervised and few-shot settings.
contrib.zh: 在LAMA知识探测（比手动提示提升20+点）和SuperGLUE的全监督及少样本设置下均取得显著提升。

contrib.en: Demonstrates effectiveness for both frozen and tuned language models, and compatibility with existing discrete prompts.
contrib.zh: 证明对冻结和微调的语言模型均有效，且与现有离散提示兼容。

contrib.en: Introduces a prompt encoder (LSTM/MLP) to model dependencies among continuous prompt embeddings, improving performance.
contrib.zh: 引入提示编码器（LSTM/MLP）建模连续提示嵌入间的依赖关系，提升性能。

contrib.en: Provides analysis on prompt token location and number, offering practical guidelines for optimal configuration.
contrib.zh: 分析提示令牌的位置和数量，为最优配置提供实用指南。

limits.en: P-Tuning requires additional trainable parameters for continuous prompts, increasing model complexity.
limits.zh: P-Tuning需要额外的可训练参数用于连续提示，增加了模型复杂度。

limits.en: Performance gains are less pronounced on high-resource tasks (e.g., WiC, MultiRC) compared to low-resource tasks.
limits.zh: 在高资源任务（如WiC、MultiRC）上的性能提升不如低资源任务显著。

limits.en: The method involves searching over prompt patterns and token numbers, which may be task-specific and time-consuming.
limits.zh: 该方法需要搜索提示模式和令牌数量，可能因任务而异且耗时。

limits.en: Effectiveness depends on the choice of prompt encoder (LSTM/MLP/EMB), with EMB being unstable on some tasks.
limits.zh: 有效性依赖于提示编码器（LSTM/MLP/EMB）的选择，EMB在某些任务上不稳定。

limits.en: Not directly applicable to tasks without discrete prompts (e.g., ReCoRD in SuperGLUE).
limits.zh: 不直接适用于没有离散提示的任务（如SuperGLUE中的ReCoRD）。

items.en: Prompting a pretrained language model with natural language patterns has been proved effective for natural language understanding (NLU). However, our preliminary study reveals that manual discrete prompts often lead to unstable performance—e.g., changing a single word in the prompt might result in substantial performance drop. We propose a novel method P-Tuning that employs trainable continuous prompt embeddings in concatenation with discrete prompts. Empirically, P-Tuning not only stabilizes training by minimizing the gap between various discrete prompts, but also improves performance by a sizeable margin on a wide range of NLU tasks including LAMA and SuperGLUE. P-Tuning is generally effective for both frozen and tuned language models, under both the fully-supervised and few-shot settings.
items.zh: 用自然语言模式提示预训练语言模型已被证明对自然语言理解（NLU）有效。然而，我们的初步研究表明，手动离散提示往往导致不稳定的性能——例如，改变提示中的一个单词可能导致性能大幅下降。我们提出了一种新方法P-Tuning，该方法将可训练的连续提示嵌入与离散提示连接起来。实验表明，P-Tuning不仅通过最小化各种离散提示之间的差距来稳定训练，而且在包括LAMA和SuperGLUE在内的广泛NLU任务上显著提升了性能。P-Tuning对于冻结和微调的语言模型，在全监督和少样本设置下均普遍有效。

items.en: Pretrained language models (PLMs; Brown et al., 2020) have significantly advanced the performance of natural language understanding (NLU). PLMs are trained with different pretraining objectives, such as masked language modeling Devlin et al. (2018), autoregressive language modeling Radford et al. (2019), seq2seq Raffel et al. (2019), and permutation language modeling Yang et al. (2019). PLMs can be further enhanced with prompting Brown et al. (2020); Schick and Schütze (2020), which employs manually written prompt patterns as additional input to a language model. With prompting while PLMs are either finetuned on a small labeled dataset or frozen for direct inference on downstream tasks. Prompting has significantly improved the performance of many NLU tasks Brown et al. (2020); Schick and Schütze (2020).
items.zh: 预训练语言模型（PLMs；Brown等人，2020）显著提升了自然语言理解（NLU）的性能。PLMs通过不同的预训练目标进行训练，例如掩码语言建模（Devlin等人，2018）、自回归语言建模（Radford等人，2019）、序列到序列（Raffel等人，2019）和排列语言建模（Yang等人，2019）。PLMs可以通过提示（Brown等人，2020；Schick和Schütze，2020）进一步增强，提示使用手动编写的提示模式作为语言模型的额外输入。在使用提示时，PLMs要么在小型标注数据集上微调，要么冻结以直接在下游任务上进行推理。提示显著提升了许多NLU任务的性能（Brown等人，2020；Schick和Schütze，2020）。

items.en: However, we observe that manual discrete prompts suffer from a large degree of instability. As shown in Table 1, with a frozen language model, changing a single word in the prompt might result in substantial performance drop. As we will show in Section 3, when the language model is tuned, the instability problem is alleviated but the performance difference between different prompts is still sizeable, especially in the few-shot setting. Such an instability issue of discrete prompts poses a critical challenge in practice. Recent approaches of automatic prompting have attempted to search for a better-performing prompt given a task Shin et al. (2020); Gao et al. (2020); Jiang et al. (2020b), but these methods do not change the unstable nature of discrete prompts.
items.zh: 然而，我们观察到手动离散提示存在很大的不稳定性。如表1所示，对于冻结的语言模型，改变提示中的一个单词可能导致性能大幅下降。正如我们将在第3节中展示的，当语言模型被微调时，不稳定性问题有所缓解，但不同提示之间的性能差异仍然很大，尤其是在少样本设置下。离散提示的这种不稳定性问题在实践中构成了关键挑战。最近的自动提示方法尝试针对给定任务搜索性能更好的提示（Shin等人，2020；Gao等人，2020；Jiang等人，2020b），但这些方法并未改变离散提示的不稳定本质。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Average scores on 7 dev datasets of SuperGLUE using P-Tuning.
items.capZh: 图1：使用P-Tuning在SuperGLUE的7个开发集上的平均得分。

items.en: To reduce the instability of discrete prompts, we propose a novel method P-Tuning that employs trainable continuous prompt embeddings in concatenation with discrete prompts. Specifically, given a discrete prompt as the input, P-Tuning concatenates continuous prompt embeddings with the discrete prompt tokens and feeds them as the input to the language model. The continuous prompts are updated by backpropagation to optimize the task objective. The intuition is that continuous prompts incorporate a certain degree of learnability into the input, which may learn to offset the effects of minor changes in discrete prompts to improve training stability. To further improve performance, we employ a prompt encoder using LSTMs or MLPs to model the dependency between continuous prompt embeddings.
items.zh: 为了减少离散提示的不稳定性，我们提出了一种新方法P-Tuning，该方法将可训练的连续提示嵌入与离散提示连接起来。具体来说，给定一个离散提示作为输入，P-Tuning将连续提示嵌入与离散提示标记连接起来，并将它们作为输入馈送到语言模型。连续提示通过反向传播更新以优化任务目标。直觉上，连续提示在输入中引入了一定程度的可学习性，这可以学习抵消离散提示中微小变化的影响，从而提高训练稳定性。为了进一步提升性能，我们使用LSTM或MLP的提示编码器来建模连续提示嵌入之间的依赖关系。

items.en: We experiment with two NLU benchmarks: the LAMA Petroni et al. (2019) knowledge probing and SuperGLUE Wang et al. (2019a). On LAMA, with the language model frozen, P-Tuning outperforms manual discrete prompts and searched prompts by 20+ points and 9 points respectively with the same pretrained models. On SuperGLUE, with the language model finetuned, P-Tuning outperforms PET Schick and Schütze (2020) with the best discrete prompts under both the fully-supervised and few-shot settings. In addition to improving performance, our results show that across a wide range of tasks and settings, P-Tuning substantially reduces the performance gap between different discrete prompts, which results in improved stability for language model adaptation.
items.zh: 我们在两个NLU基准上进行了实验：LAMA（Petroni等人，2019）知识探测和SuperGLUE（Wang等人，2019a）。在LAMA上，语言模型冻结时，P-Tuning在相同预训练模型下分别比手动离散提示和搜索提示高出20多个点和9个点。在SuperGLUE上，语言模型微调时，P-Tuning在全监督和少样本设置下均优于使用最佳离散提示的PET（Schick和Schütze，2020）。除了提升性能，我们的结果表明，在广泛的任务和设置中，P-Tuning显著减少了不同离散提示之间的性能差距，从而提高了语言模型适应的稳定性。

items.en: Prompting employs natural language patterns as additional inputs to pretrained language models for adaptation to downstream tasks Brown et al. (2020); Schick and Schütze (2020). Prior work Zheng et al. (2021) has pointed out that prompting has achieved consistent and substantial improvements on a number of NLP tasks. However, it still remains a challenging problem of how to write high-performing discrete prompts.
items.zh: 提示使用自然语言模式作为预训练语言模型的额外输入，以适应下游任务（Brown等人，2020；Schick和Schütze，2020）。先前的工作（Zheng等人，2021）指出，提示在许多NLP任务上取得了持续且显著的改进。然而，如何编写高性能的离散提示仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。

items.en: We performed preliminary experiments using different manual prompts on the LAMA knowledge probing task Petroni et al. (2019), which aims to extract triplet knowledge from a language model by predicting the tail entities. Results in Table 1 show that manual discrete prompts lead to unstable performance. For example, if we compare the last two prompts in the table, changing a single word in prompt causes a drastic decrease of 20 points in performance.
items.zh: 我们在LAMA知识探测任务（Petroni等人，2019）上使用不同的手动提示进行了初步实验，该任务旨在通过预测尾实体从语言模型中提取三元组知识。表1中的结果表明，手动离散提示导致性能不稳定。例如，如果我们比较表中的最后两个提示，改变提示中的一个单词会导致性能急剧下降20个点。

items.en: In light of the challenge, recent works propose to automate the search procedure of discrete prompts by mining the training corpus Jiang et al. (2020b), gradient-based searching Shin et al. (2020), and using pretrained generative models Gao et al. (2020). However, these works aim at searching for better-performing prompts but do not change the nature of instability for discrete prompts. In addition to the instability issue, searching in the discrete space might not be able to fully leverage the gradients from backpropagation, which will potentially result in suboptimal solutions. To this end, we explore the possibility of training continuous prompts to stabilize and improve the performance of language model adaptation.
items.zh: 鉴于这一挑战，最近的工作提出通过挖掘训练语料库（Jiang等人，2020b）、基于梯度的搜索（Shin等人，2020）和使用预训练生成模型（Gao等人，2020）来自动化离散提示的搜索过程。然而，这些工作旨在搜索性能更好的提示，并未改变离散提示的不稳定本质。除了不稳定性问题，在离散空间中搜索可能无法充分利用反向传播的梯度，这可能导致次优解。为此，我们探索了训练连续提示以稳定和提升语言模型适应性能的可能性。

items.capEn: Figure 2: An example of prompt search for “The capital of Britain is [MASK]”. Given the context (blue zone, “Britain”) and target (red zone, “[MASK]”), the orange zone refer to the prompt. In (a), the prompt generator only receives discrete rewards; on the contrary, in (b) the continuous prompt embeddings and prompt encoder can be optimized in a differentiable way.
items.capZh: 图2：提示搜索示例“The capital of Britain is [MASK]”。给定上下文（蓝色区域，“Britain”）和目标（红色区域，“[MASK]”），橙色区域指提示。在（a）中，提示生成器仅接收离散奖励；相反，在（b）中，连续提示嵌入和提示编码器可以以可微分的方式优化。

items.en: Formally, let ℳℳ\mathcal{M} be a pretrained language model with a hidden size of hℎh and a vocabulary size of |𝒱|𝒱|\mathcal{V}|. Let {(𝐱i,𝐲i))}i\{(\mathbf{x}_{i},\mathbf{y}_{i}))\}_{i} be a labeled dataset for an NLU task, where 𝐱0:n={x0,x1,…,xn}subscript𝐱:0𝑛subscript𝑥0subscript𝑥1…subscript𝑥𝑛\mathbf{x}_{0:n}=\{x_{0},x_{1},...,x_{n}\} is an input consisting of a sequence of discrete tokens, and 𝐲∈𝒴𝐲𝒴\mathbf{y}\in\mathcal{Y} is a label. Our goal is to estimate the conditional probability for classification fℳ​(x)=p^​(y|x)subscript𝑓ℳ𝑥^𝑝conditional𝑦𝑥f_{\mathcal{M}}(x)=\hat{p}(y|x) with parameters of ℳℳ\mathcal{M} either finetuned or frozen.
items.zh: 形式上，令ℳ为一个隐藏大小为h、词汇表大小为|𝒱|的预训练语言模型。令{(𝐱_i, 𝐲_i))}_i为NLU任务的标注数据集，其中𝐱_{0:n}={x_0, x_1, ..., x_n}是由离散标记序列组成的输入，𝐲∈𝒴是标签。我们的目标是估计分类的条件概率f_ℳ(x)=p̂(y|x)，其中ℳ的参数要么微调要么冻结。

items.en: Prompting was proposed in the format of discrete tokens Schick and Schütze (2020). Let [Di]delimited-[]subscriptD𝑖[\mathrm{D}_{i}] be a discrete prompt token. Each prompt can be described as a template T={[D0:i],𝐱,[D(i+1):j],𝐲,[D(j+1):k]}𝑇delimited-[]subscriptD:0𝑖𝐱delimited-[]subscriptD:𝑖1𝑗𝐲delimited-[]subscriptD:𝑗1𝑘T=\{[\mathrm{D}_{0:i}],\mathbf{x},[\mathrm{D}_{(i+1):j}],\mathbf{y},[\mathrm{D}_{(j+1):k}]\}, which could organize the labeled data (including the inputs 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} and the label 𝐲𝐲\mathbf{y}) into a sequence of text tokens, such that the task could be reformulated as filling in the blanks of the input text. For example, for the task of predicting a country’s capital (LAMA-TREx P36), a prompt could be “The capital of [INPUT] is [LABEL].” With a piece of labeled data “(Britain, London)”, the reformulated text would be “The capital of Britain is [MASK].”, where “[MASK]" should predict the given label “London”. Both discrete prompts and discrete data are together mapped into input embeddings:
items.zh: 提示以离散标记的形式提出（Schick和Schütze，2020）。令[D_i]为离散提示标记。每个提示可以描述为模板T={[D_{0:i}], 𝐱, [D_{(i+1):j}], 𝐲, [D_{(j+1):k}]}，该模板可以将标注数据（包括输入𝐱和标签𝐲）组织成文本标记序列，从而将任务重新表述为填充输入文本中的空白。例如，对于预测国家首都的任务（LAMA-TREx P36），提示可以是“The capital of [INPUT] is [LABEL].”。对于标注数据“(Britain, London)”，重新表述的文本将是“The capital of Britain is [MASK].”，其中“[MASK]”应预测给定标签“London”。离散提示和离散数据一起通过预训练嵌入层映射到输入嵌入：

items.en: through the pretrained embedding layer, where 𝐞∈ℝ|𝒱|×d𝐞superscriptℝ𝒱𝑑\mathbf{e}\in\mathbb{R}^{|\mathcal{V}|\times d}.
items.zh: 其中𝐞∈ℝ^{|𝒱|×d}。

items.en: However, as is discussed in Section 2.1, such discrete prompts tend to be extremely unstable and might not be optimal with back-propagation. Therefore, we propose P-Tuning that uses continuous prompt embeddings to improve and stabilize prompting. Let [PisubscriptP𝑖\mathrm{P}_{i}] be the ithsuperscript𝑖thi^{\mathrm{th}} continuous prompt embedding. The prompt template for P-Tuning is as follows:
items.zh: 然而，如第2.1节所述，这种离散提示往往极不稳定，并且可能无法通过反向传播达到最优。因此，我们提出P-Tuning，使用连续提示嵌入来改进和稳定提示。令[P_i]为第i个连续提示嵌入。P-Tuning的提示模板如下：

items.en: P-Tuning leverages an extra embedding function f:[Pi]→hi:𝑓→delimited-[]subscriptP𝑖subscriptℎ𝑖f:[\mathrm{P}_{i}]\to h_{i} to map the template to
items.zh: P-Tuning利用额外的嵌入函数f: [P_i] → h_i将模板映射到

items.en: Finally, we update the embeddings {Pi}i=1ksuperscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑃𝑖𝑖1𝑘\{P_{i}\}_{i=1}^{k} to optimize a task loss function.
items.zh: 最后，我们更新嵌入{P_i}_{i=1}^k以优化任务损失函数。

items.en: It is noteworthy that we can also concatenate discrete prompts with continuous prompts, which performs better and is adopted throughout our experiments. P-Tuning is applicable to both frozen and finetuned language models.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，我们也可以将离散提示与连续提示连接起来，这表现更好，并在我们的实验中采用。P-Tuning适用于冻结和微调的语言模型。

items.en: In the aforementioned framework, we employ a mapping function f𝑓f to map trainable embeddings {Pi}subscript𝑃𝑖\{P_{i}\} to model inputs {hi}subscriptℎ𝑖\{h_{i}\}. The intuition is that by using a mapping function, it is more convenient to model the dependency between different prompt embeddings, compared to using independent learnable embeddings. In our implementation, we use a lightweight neural network to formulate the function f𝑓f. Specifically, we experiment with using long short-term memory (LSTM) networks, multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs), and the identity mapping function in Section 3.
items.zh: 在上述框架中，我们使用映射函数f将可训练嵌入{P_i}映射到模型输入{h_i}。直觉上，通过使用映射函数，与使用独立可学习嵌入相比，更容易建模不同提示嵌入之间的依赖关系。在我们的实现中，我们使用轻量级神经网络来构建函数f。具体来说，我们在第3节中实验了使用长短期记忆网络（LSTM）、多层感知机（MLP）和恒等映射函数。

items.en: We include two NLU benchmarks: LAMA Petroni et al. (2019) for knowledge probing (§ 3.1) and SuperGLUE Wang et al. (2019a) for general natural language understanding. On SuperGLUE, we consider both the fully-supervised learning (§ 3.2) and few-shot learning (§ 3.3) settings.
items.zh: 我们包括两个NLU基准：用于知识探测的LAMA（Petroni等人，2019）（§3.1）和用于通用自然语言理解的SuperGLUE（Wang等人，2019a）。在SuperGLUE上，我们考虑了全监督学习（§3.2）和少样本学习（§3.3）设置。

items.en: On LAMA, following Shin et al. (2020); Jiang et al. (2020b), language models are frozen and only the discrete or continious prompts are tuned. For SuperGLUE, following Schick and Schütze (2020); Zheng et al. (2021), language models are tuned. In our setting, we jointly optimize the language model parameters and the continuous prompts. This setup not only follows the common, standard settings in prior work, but also allows evaluating P-Tuning with both tuned and frozen language models.
items.zh: 在LAMA上，遵循Shin等人（2020）；Jiang等人（2020b），语言模型被冻结，仅调整离散或连续提示。对于SuperGLUE，遵循Schick和Schütze（2020）；Zheng等人（2021），语言模型被微调。在我们的设置中，我们联合优化语言模型参数和连续提示。这种设置不仅遵循先前工作中常见的标准设置，而且允许在微调和冻结语言模型下评估P-Tuning。

items.en: The overall task setup and a summary of results are shown in Table 2.
items.zh: 整体任务设置和结果总结见表2。

items.en: Knowledge probing, or referred to as fact retrieval, evaluates how much real-world knowledge has language models gained from pre-training. The LAMA Petroni et al. (2019) dataset evaluates it with cloze tests created from triples selected in the knowledge bases.
items.zh: 知识探测，或称事实检索，评估语言模型从预训练中获得了多少真实世界知识。LAMA（Petroni等人，2019）数据集通过从知识库中选择的三元组构建的完形填空测试来评估这一点。

items.en: Datasets and vocabulary. LAMA enforces all answers in single-token format. We first adopt the original LAMA-TREx dataset, consisting of 41 Wikidata relations and altogether 34,039 testing triples (namely LAMA-34k, which covers all BERT vocabularies). Since different pretrained models share distinct vocabularies, to allow direct comparison, we follow previous work Shin et al. (2020) to adopt a subset that covers the intersection of GPT’s and BERT’s vocabularies. This is caled LAMA-29k. We again follow Shin et al. (2020) to construct the training, development, and test data to allow for fair comparison.
items.zh: 数据集和词汇表。LAMA要求所有答案采用单token格式。我们首先采用原始的LAMA-TREx数据集，包含41个维基数据关系和总共34,039个测试三元组（即LAMA-34k，覆盖所有BERT词汇表）。由于不同的预训练模型共享不同的词汇表，为了直接比较，我们遵循先前工作（Shin等人，2020）采用一个子集，该子集覆盖GPT和BERT词汇表的交集，称为LAMA-29k。我们再次遵循Shin等人（2020）构建训练、开发和测试数据，以便进行公平比较。

items.en: Setup. LAMA has provided a handcraft prompt for each relation, as shown in Table 1, which are effective but likely sub-optimal. For bidirectional masked language models, we only need to replace “[X]” with the subject entity and “[Y]” with the [MASK] token; for unidirectional language models such as GPT, following LAMA’s original setting on Transformer-XL Dai et al. (2019), we use the network output just before the target position.
items.zh: 设置。LAMA为每个关系提供了手工制作的提示，如表1所示，这些提示有效但可能次优。对于双向掩码语言模型，我们只需将“[X]”替换为主语实体，将“[Y]”替换为[MASK]标记；对于单向语言模型（如GPT），遵循LAMA在Transformer-XL（Dai等人，2019）上的原始设置，我们使用目标位置之前的网络输出。

items.en: The number of prompt tokens and positions are selected based on the development sets, and for simplicity we choose the (3, sub, org_prompt, 3, obj, 3) template for bidirectional models and (3, sub, org_prompt, 3, obj) for unidirectional models as this configuration performs well for most relations (where the number indicates the number of continuous prompt tokens). Continuous prompts are concatenated with original discrete prompts. During the prompt training, we set the learning rate to 1e-5 and use the Adam optimizer.
items.zh: 提示token的数量和位置基于开发集选择，为简单起见，我们为双向模型选择(3, sub, org_prompt, 3, obj, 3)模板，为单向模型选择(3, sub, org_prompt, 3, obj)模板，因为这种配置对大多数关系表现良好（其中数字表示连续提示token的数量）。连续提示与原始离散提示拼接。在提示训练期间，我们将学习率设置为1e-5，并使用Adam优化器。

items.en: The results are presented in Table 3. P-tuning significantly improves the best results of knowledge probing from 43.3% to 50.6% on LAMA-34k and from 45.2% to 64.2% on LAMA-29k. Moreover, P-tuning outperforms previous discrete prompt searching approaches such as AutoPrompt Shin et al. (2020) and LPAQA Jiang et al. (2020b) on the same-size models. This confirms our intuition in Section 2 that discrete prompts might not be optimal.
items.zh: 结果如表3所示。P-tuning显著提高了知识探测的最佳结果，在LAMA-34k上从43.3%提升到50.6%，在LAMA-29k上从45.2%提升到64.2%。此外，P-tuning在相同规模的模型上优于先前的离散提示搜索方法，如AutoPrompt（Shin等人，2020）和LPAQA（Jiang等人，2020b）。这证实了我们在第2节中的直觉，即离散提示可能不是最优的。

items.en: Dataset. To evaluate P-tuning on fully-supervised learning tasks, we adopt the SuperGLUE benchmark Wang et al. (2019b), consisting of 8 challenging natural language understanding (NLU) tasks. We focus on 7 of them since the ReCoRD Zhang et al. (2018) task adopts no discrete prompts, thus P-tuning is not directly applicable. The tasks include question answering (BoolQ Clark et al. (2019a) & MultiRC Khashabi et al. (2018)), textual entailment (CB De Marneffe et al. (2019) & RTE Dagan et al. (2005)), co-reference resolution (WiC Pilehvar and Camacho-Collados (2018)), causal reasoning (COPA Roemmele et al. (2011)), and word sense disambiguation (WSC Levesque et al. (2012)).
items.zh: 数据集。为了在全监督学习任务上评估P-tuning，我们采用SuperGLUE基准（Wang等人，2019b），包含8个具有挑战性的自然语言理解（NLU）任务。我们关注其中7个，因为ReCoRD（Zhang等人，2018）任务没有采用离散提示，因此P-tuning不直接适用。这些任务包括问答（BoolQ（Clark等人，2019a）和MultiRC（Khashabi等人，2018））、文本蕴含（CB（De Marneffe等人，2019）和RTE（Dagan等人，2005））、共指消解（WiC（Pilehvar和Camacho-Collados，2018））、因果推理（COPA（Roemmele等人，2011））和词义消歧（WSC（Levesque等人，2012））。

items.en: Comparison methods. We experiment with P-tuning on both unidirectional and bidirectional pretrained models, i.e., GPT and BERT. We include four variants BERT-Base, BERT-Large, GPT2-Base, and GPT-medium. For each model, we compare standard classification finetuning, PET Schick and Schütze (2020) (a typical finetuning method based on manual discrete prompts) and our P-tuning.
items.zh: 比较方法。我们在单向和双向预训练模型（即GPT和BERT）上实验P-tuning。我们包括四个变体：BERT-Base、BERT-Large、GPT2-Base和GPT-medium。对于每个模型，我们比较标准分类微调、PET（Schick和Schütze，2020）（一种基于手动离散提示的典型微调方法）和我们的P-tuning。

items.en: Configuration. We use the same metrics as in Wang et al. (2019b). For fully-supervised learning, we use a large training set to finetune pretrained models and use a development set for hyper-parameter and model selection. Specifically, the AdamW optimizer with a linearly decayed learning rate is used for training. We use a learning rate of {1​e−5,2​e−5,3​e−5}1𝑒52𝑒53𝑒5\{1e-5,2e-5,3e-5\}, a batch size of {16,32}1632\{16,32\}, and a warm-up ratio of {0.0,0.05,0.1}0.00.050.1\{0.0,0.05,0.1\}. For small datasets (i.e., COPA, WSC, CB, RTE), we fine-tune pretrained models for 20 epochs. For larger datasets (i.e., WiC, BoolQ, MultiRC), we reduce the number of training epochs to be 10 as the model converges earlier. Early stopping is used to avoid over-fitting the training data.
items.zh: 配置。我们使用与Wang等人（2019b）相同的指标。对于全监督学习，我们使用大型训练集微调预训练模型，并使用开发集进行超参数和模型选择。具体来说，使用AdamW优化器和线性衰减学习率进行训练。我们使用学习率{1e-5, 2e-5, 3e-5}、批量大小{16, 32}和预热比例{0.0, 0.05, 0.1}。对于小型数据集（即COPA、WSC、CB、RTE），我们微调预训练模型20个epoch。对于较大的数据集（即WiC、BoolQ、MultiRC），由于模型较早收敛，我们将训练epoch数减少到10。使用早停法以避免过拟合训练数据。

items.en: The main results of fully-supervised learning are shown in Table 4. We observe that P-tuning can improve fully-supervised learning performance on both BERTs and GPTs. (1) Specifically, on the BERT-Base model, P-tuning achieves best performance on 5/7 tasks, while with BERT-Large, P-tuning outperforms other methods on 4/7 tasks. The exceptions are WiC and MultiRC, both of which have relatively large training sets. We find that P-tuning might not have large gains over CLS-FT on such high-resource tasks, while benefits more on low-resource tasks. On average, P-tuning improves over the considered baselines. (2) On GPT2-Base and GPT2-Medium models, P-tuning consistently achieves the best performance on all tasks.
items.zh: 全监督学习的主要结果如表4所示。我们观察到P-tuning可以在BERT和GPT上提高全监督学习性能。（1）具体来说，在BERT-Base模型上，P-tuning在5/7个任务上取得最佳性能，而在BERT-Large上，P-tuning在4/7个任务上优于其他方法。例外是WiC和MultiRC，两者都有相对较大的训练集。我们发现P-tuning在这些高资源任务上可能不会比CLS-FT有大的增益，而在低资源任务上受益更多。平均而言，P-tuning优于考虑的基线。（2）在GPT2-Base和GPT2-Medium模型上，P-tuning在所有任务上一致取得最佳性能。

items.en: While GPT-3 has shown decent few-shot learning potential with handcrafted prompts, it still struggles on some of the challenging tasks (e.g., natural language inference) Brown et al. (2020). We are motivated to study whether P-tuning can also improve the few-shot learning performance of pretrained models on challenging tasks.
items.zh: 虽然GPT-3在手写提示下展示了不错的少样本学习潜力，但它仍然在一些具有挑战性的任务（如自然语言推理）上存在困难（Brown等人，2020）。我们受到启发，研究P-tuning是否也能提高预训练模型在挑战性任务上的少样本学习性能。

items.en: Few-shot Evaluation. The few-shot performance is sensitive to lots of factors (e.g., the order of training examples, random seed, and prompt patterns), and thus suffers from high variance Zhao et al. (2021a); Lu et al. (2021); Zhang et al. (2020). Therefore, the few-shot evaluation strategy should make sure that the improvements are indeed from an improved method instead of variance. To this end, we follow the FewNLU evaluation procedure Zheng et al. (2021) that has addressed and handled the issue. Specifically, we use random data splits to perform model selection only on a small labeled set to prevent overfitting a large dev set.
items.zh: 少样本评估。少样本性能对许多因素敏感（例如，训练示例的顺序、随机种子和提示模式），因此具有高方差（Zhao等人，2021a；Lu等人，2021；Zhang等人，2020）。因此，少样本评估策略应确保改进确实来自改进的方法而非方差。为此，我们遵循FewNLU评估程序（Zheng等人，2021），该程序已解决并处理了该问题。具体来说，我们使用随机数据分割仅在小型标记集上进行模型选择，以防止过拟合大型开发集。

items.en: Dataset. We use the few-shot SuperGLUE (also known as FewGLUE) benchmark Schick and Schütze (2020) and follow the setting in prior work Zheng et al. (2021) in terms of data split construction.
items.zh: 数据集。我们使用少样本SuperGLUE（也称为FewGLUE）基准（Schick和Schütze，2020），并遵循先前工作（Zheng等人，2021）在数据分割构建方面的设置。

items.en: Baseline and Hyper-parameter. In few-shot learning, we again compare P-tuning with PET Schick and Schütze (2020), which was shown to outperform GPT-3 on some of the tasks. Similar to Schick and Schütze (2020), we use ALBERT-xxLarge as the base model. For hyper-parameters that are shared by PET and P-tuning (e.g., learning rate, maximum training step, evaluation frequency), we use the same search space for fair comparison. Specifically, we search the learning rate in {1​e−5,2​e−5}1𝑒52𝑒5\{1e-5,2e-5\}, the maximum training step in {250,500}250500\{250,500\}, and the evaluation frequency in {0.02,0.04}0.020.04\{0.02,0.04\}.
items.zh: 基线和超参数。在少样本学习中，我们再次将P-tuning与PET（Schick和Schütze，2020）进行比较，后者在某些任务上被证明优于GPT-3。与Schick和Schütze（2020）类似，我们使用ALBERT-xxLarge作为基础模型。对于PET和P-tuning共享的超参数（例如学习率、最大训练步数、评估频率），我们使用相同的搜索空间以进行公平比较。具体来说，我们在{1e-5, 2e-5}中搜索学习率，在{250, 500}中搜索最大训练步数，在{0.02, 0.04}中搜索评估频率。

items.en: Construction of Prompt Patterns. For PET, we use the same manual prompts reported by Schick and Schütze (2020). When constructing prompt patterns for P-tuning, based on the same manual prompts as PET, we insert different numbers of continuous prompt tokens into different positions, thus formulating a number of pattern candidates. We then select the best pattern for P-tuning using the validation strategy of FewNLU Zheng et al. (2021). We also conduct further analysis of the number and the position of continuous prompt tokens in §8.
items.zh: 提示模式的构建。对于PET，我们使用Schick和Schütze（2020）报告的相同手动提示。在为P-tuning构建提示模式时，基于与PET相同的手动提示，我们在不同位置插入不同数量的连续提示token，从而形成多个模式候选。然后，我们使用FewNLU的验证策略（Zheng等人，2021）为P-tuning选择最佳模式。我们还在第8节中对连续提示token的数量和位置进行了进一步分析。

items.en: Few-Shot Performance. Table 5 shows the main results of few-shot learning. We find that, on ALBERT, P-tuning consistently outperform PET on average by more than 1 points. It outperforms PromptTuning by more than 13 points. It proves that by automatically learning continuous prompt tokens, the pretrained models can achieve better few-shot performance on NLU tasks.
items.zh: 少样本性能。表5显示了少样本学习的主要结果。我们发现，在ALBERT上，P-tuning平均比PET持续高出1个多点。它比PromptTuning高出13个多点。这证明通过自动学习连续提示token，预训练模型可以在NLU任务上实现更好的少样本性能。

items.en: Type of Prompt Encoder Prior work Shin et al. (2020) proposes to simply use an MLP as the prompt encoder, we perform further ablation analysis for prompt encoder selection, and results are shown in Table 8. We consider LSTM, MLP, and EMB (i.e., we directly optimize the word embeddings without using additional parameters). From the results, we can see that LSTM, MLP, and EMB all work as a prompt encoder. Results show that both LSTM and MLP generally work well on these tasks, while EMB is unstable and can substantially under-perform the other two on some tasks (e.g,. WiC and CB). To sum up, both LSTM and MLP could be taken into account when working on new tasks.
items.zh: 提示编码器的类型。先前工作（Shin等人，2020）提出简单使用MLP作为提示编码器，我们对提示编码器选择进行了进一步的消融分析，结果如表8所示。我们考虑了LSTM、MLP和EMB（即直接优化词嵌入而不使用额外参数）。从结果可以看出，LSTM、MLP和EMB都可以作为提示编码器。结果表明，LSTM和MLP通常在这些任务上表现良好，而EMB不稳定，在某些任务（如WiC和CB）上可能显著不如其他两者。总之，在处理新任务时，可以考虑LSTM和MLP。

items.en: Location of Prompt Tokens To study at which location to insert continuous prompt tokens, we perform experiments as Table 7 shows. From the results, we have the following findings.
items.zh: 提示token的位置。为了研究在哪个位置插入连续提示token，我们进行了如表7所示的实验。从结果中，我们有以下发现。

items.en: By comparing #1 (or #2) with #3 (or #4), we find that it would be better if we insert continuous prompt tokens at the location where it does not segment the sentences. For example, in case#1, “[P]” breaks the completeness of sentence “[Hypothesis]?” while in case#3, “[P]” is located between sentences.
items.zh: 通过比较#1（或#2）与#3（或#4），我们发现将连续提示token插入在不分割句子的位置会更好。例如，在情况#1中，“[P]”破坏了句子“[Hypothesis]?”的完整性，而在情况#3中，“[P]”位于句子之间。

items.en: By comparing #2 (or #3) with #4, we find that there’s no special preference for placing on the edge or in the middle of the inputs.
items.zh: 通过比较#2（或#3）与#4，我们发现放置在输入的边缘或中间没有特别偏好。

items.en: It is suggested to write a number of pattern candidates and then search over them for the best for each task.
items.zh: 建议编写多个模式候选，然后搜索每个任务的最佳模式。

items.en: Number of Prompt Tokens We also study the influence of the number of prompt tokens and show the results in Table 7. By comparing #3, #6, #7, and #8, we can conclude that the number of prompt tokens has a great impact on the few-shot performance. However, it is not that a larger number of prompt tokens would always be better. We conjecture that it could be that due to the limited training data, it becomes difficult to learn the parameters when excessively increasing the number of continuous prompt tokens. In practice, it is suggested to search for the best number of prompt tokens through model selection.
items.zh: 提示词数量 我们还研究了提示词数量的影响，结果如表7所示。通过比较#3、#6、#7和#8，可以得出结论：提示词数量对少样本性能有很大影响。然而，并非提示词数量越多越好。我们推测，由于训练数据有限，过度增加连续提示词数量会导致参数难以学习。实践中，建议通过模型选择搜索最佳提示词数量。

items.en: Prior work Gao et al. (2020) proposed to automatically search discrete prompts and achieved better results than those of manual prompts. We now proceed to compare P-Tuning with auto-searched discrete prompts. For fair comparison, we follow the setting of LM-BFF Gao et al. (2020) to also conduct experiments on some of the GLUE tasks Wang et al. (2018) with RoBERTa-Large model Liu et al. (2019). Since the the evaluation protocols have large impacts on few-shot performance, we use the top-3 discrete prompts searched by LM-BFF and experiment with using only the discrete prompts and additionally applying P-Tuning. For P-Tuning, the prompt patterns are constructed by concatenating the same discrete prompts as well as continuous prompts. Results in Table 9 show that additionally incorporating continuous prompts can further improve few-shot performance. P-Tuning is easy to be combined with existing discrete prompts, while further improving stability as discussed in Section 3.4.
items.zh: 先前工作 Gao等人(2020)提出自动搜索离散提示词，并取得了优于人工提示词的结果。现在我们将P-Tuning与自动搜索的离散提示词进行比较。为公平比较，我们遵循LM-BFF Gao等人(2020)的设置，在部分GLUE任务Wang等人(2018)上使用RoBERTa-Large模型Liu等人(2019)进行实验。由于评估协议对少样本性能影响很大，我们使用LM-BFF搜索的前3个离散提示词，分别实验仅使用离散提示词以及额外应用P-Tuning。对于P-Tuning，提示模式由相同的离散提示词和连续提示词拼接而成。表9结果显示，额外加入连续提示词可以进一步提升少样本性能。P-Tuning易于与现有离散提示词结合，同时如第3.4节所述进一步提高了稳定性。

items.en: In the above sections, we have shown that P-Tuning improves over performance across multiple settings. Now we present results to demonstrate that P-Tuning also stabilizes language model adaptation; i.e., reducing the differences between different prompts. As we have shown in Table 1, manual prompts have a large impact on the performance. When it comes to few-shot learning, the performance gap of different prompts is prominent due to the sensitivity of few-shot learning Zheng et al. (2021). Results in Table 6 show that P-tuning improves the performance of the worst-performing patterns (e.g., P#5), and achieves a smaller standard deviation over multiple patterns. Compared to PET-FT, P-tuning increases the stability w.r.t. the choice of patterns.
items.zh: 上述章节中，我们展示了P-Tuning在多种设置下提升了性能。现在呈现结果证明P-Tuning还能稳定语言模型适配，即减少不同提示词之间的差异。如表1所示，人工提示词对性能影响很大。在少样本学习中，由于少样本学习的敏感性Zheng等人(2021)，不同提示词的性能差距尤为显著。表6结果显示，P-Tuning提升了表现最差模式（如P#5）的性能，并在多个模式上实现了更小的标准差。与PET-FT相比，P-Tuning提高了对模式选择的稳定性。

items.en: On LAMA, we observe similar a phenomenon that while manual prompts often yield quite volatile results, appending trainable continuous prompts on top of the manual prompts can stabilize their performances, reducing the standard deviation from 10.1 to 0.46.
items.zh: 在LAMA上，我们观察到类似现象：虽然人工提示词通常产生相当波动的结果，但在人工提示词上附加可训练的连续提示词可以稳定其性能，将标准差从10.1降低到0.46。

items.en: Language Model Prompting. GPT-3 Brown et al. (2020) uses in-context examples Liu et al. (2021); Zhao et al. (2021b) as a way of prompting to transfer knowledge from pretraining to downstream tasks. Schick and Schütze (2020) proposed to use cloze patterns, which removes the constraint that the masked token is the last token of the sentence. This further minimizes the gap between pretraining and downstream tasks. To improve prompting for NLU, recent works have proposed methods to automatically search for high-performing prompts by mining the training corpus Jiang et al. (2020b), gradient-based search Shin et al. (2020), or using pretrained generative models Gao et al. (2020). Our approach is different from these prior works in that we resort to using continuous prompt embeddings, which are found to be complementary to discrete prompts in our experiments.
items.zh: 语言模型提示。GPT-3 Brown等人(2020)使用上下文示例Liu等人(2021); Zhao等人(2021b)作为提示方式，将知识从预训练迁移到下游任务。Schick和Schütze(2020)提出使用完形填空模式，消除了掩码标记必须是句子最后一个标记的限制，进一步缩小了预训练与下游任务之间的差距。为改进NLU的提示，近期工作提出了通过挖掘训练语料Jiang等人(2020b)、基于梯度的搜索Shin等人(2020)或使用预训练生成模型Gao等人(2020)自动搜索高性能提示的方法。我们的方法与这些先前工作不同，我们采用连续提示嵌入，实验发现其与离散提示互补。

items.en: Recently, some concurrent works also proposed the use of continuous prompts. Prefix-tuning Li and Liang (2021) adds continuous prompts at the beginning of the sequence for each layer. In contrast to our work, prefix-tuning targets natural language generation tasks.
items.zh: 最近，一些并行工作也提出了使用连续提示。Prefix-tuning Li和Liang(2021)在每层序列开头添加连续提示。与我们的工作不同，prefix-tuning针对自然语言生成任务。

items.en: In the area of NLU, a few concurrent methods were proposed based on continuous prompts, focusing on improving knowledge probing Qin and Eisner (2021); Zhong et al. (2021). Lester et al. (2021) showed that with large pretrained models, only tuning continuous prompts with a frozen language model achieves comparable performance to full-model tuning.
items.zh: 在NLU领域，基于连续提示提出了一些并行方法，专注于改进知识探测Qin和Eisner(2021); Zhong等人(2021)。Lester等人(2021)表明，使用大型预训练模型，仅调整连续提示而冻结语言模型即可达到与全模型调整相当的性能。

items.en: Compared to these concurrent works on NLU, P-Tuning reaches a unique conclusion that continuous prompts improve performance and stabilize training with either frozen or tuned models under both the few-shot and fully-supervised settings. For example, no concurrent works have shown that continuous prompts can improve performance with a tuned language model. Technically, P-Tuning also has a few unique designs such as using hybrid continuous-discrete prompts and employing a prompt encoder.
items.zh: 与这些NLU并行工作相比，P-Tuning得出了一个独特结论：在少样本和全监督设置下，无论是冻结还是调整模型，连续提示都能提升性能并稳定训练。例如，没有并行工作表明连续提示能在调整语言模型时提升性能。技术上，P-Tuning也有一些独特设计，如使用混合连续-离散提示和采用提示编码器。

items.en: Knowledge in Language Models. Self-supervised Liu et al. (2020) pre-trained language models Han et al. (2021) including GPT Radford et al. (2019), BERT Devlin et al. (2018), XLNet Yang et al. (2019), RoBERTa Liu et al. (2019) have been observed to learn not only contextualized text representations but also linguistic and world knowledge. Hewitt and Manning (2019) demonstrates that contextualized representations produced by language models can form a parse tree in the embedding space. Vig (2019); Clark et al. (2019b) look into the multi-head attention patterns within transformers and discover that certain attention heads may correspond to some grammatical functions, including co-reference and noun modifiers. LAMA Petroni et al. (2019, 2020) propose the LAMA task that leverages cloze tests to predict the fact triples of knowledge bases to examine language model’s ability of memorizing facts with answers in the single-token format. In Wang et al. (2020), the authors investigate the attention matrices to find evidence about knowledge triples contained in the context. Jiang et al. (2020a) develops a multi-token fact retrieval dataset based on LAMA.
items.zh: 语言模型中的知识。自监督Liu等人(2020)预训练语言模型Han等人(2021)，包括GPT Radford等人(2019)、BERT Devlin等人(2018)、XLNet Yang等人(2019)、RoBERTa Liu等人(2019)，已被观察到不仅学习上下文文本表示，还学习语言和世界知识。Hewitt和Manning(2019)证明语言模型产生的上下文表示可以在嵌入空间中形成解析树。Vig(2019); Clark等人(2019b)研究Transformer中的多头注意力模式，发现某些注意力头可能对应某些语法功能，包括共指和名词修饰语。LAMA Petroni等人(2019, 2020)提出LAMA任务，利用完形填空预测知识库的事实三元组，以检验语言模型记忆单标记格式答案的事实能力。在Wang等人(2020)中，作者研究注意力矩阵以寻找上下文中包含知识三元组的证据。Jiang等人(2020a)基于LAMA开发了多标记事实检索数据集。

items.en: In this paper, we present a method P-Tuning that uses continuous prompts in concatenation with discrete prompts. P-Tuning improves performance and stabilizes training for pretrained language model adaptation. P-Tuning is effective with both tuned and frozen language models under both the few-shot and fully-supervised setings.
items.zh: 本文提出了一种方法P-Tuning，使用连续提示与离散提示拼接。P-Tuning提升了预训练语言模型适配的性能并稳定了训练。P-Tuning在少样本和全监督设置下，对调整和冻结的语言模型均有效。
